metadata.title: Security Posture Analyzer | Passive Reconnaissance Tool
metadata.description: Analyze domain security with passive reconnaissance. Check HTTP headers, SSL certificates, SPF, DMARC, and DNS records. 100% legal, non-intrusive scanning.

home.title: Security Posture
home.subtitle: Reconnaissance Analyzer
home.description: Perform passive security reconnaissance on any domain. Check HTTP headers, SSL certificates, and DNS email security.

footer.disclaimer: This tool performs passive reconnaissance only. No active payloads, SQLi, XSS, or brute-forcing.

step1.title: Welcome! 👋
step1.description: This tool analyzes domain security with passive reconnaissance. No intrusive scanning - 100% legal!

step2.title: Choose Scan Mode
step2.description: Pick Security, Performance, or Pentest scan.

step3.title: Enter Domain
step3.description: Type any domain (e.g., example.com) and click Scan.

step4.title: View Results
step4.description: See your security grade, score, and detailed findings.
